name: Veletas
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2013) / AGP port
description: Drawless territory game, a close relative of Amazons (Bolaños Mures, 2013; BGG Best Combinatorial 2-Player Game of 2013). Shared neutral shooters move like chess queens and shoot stones of your colour. A shooter that can no longer move is claimed by whoever owns the biggest group of stones orthogonally adjacent to it (tie or none: the trapper's opponent). Claim a majority of the shooters to win. Setup pie rule: the second player chooses sides after the first player places the initial shooters and stone.
